allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('type:', j.type\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(j.exports, null, 2\)\); console.log\('main:', j.main\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('type:', j.type\); console.log\('main:', j.main\); console.log\('exports keys:', JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(j.exports||{}\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('type:', j.type\); console.log\('main:', j.main\); console.log\('exports:', JSON.stringify\(j.exports, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{const j=JSON.parse\(d.join\(''\)\); if\(j.status===404\){console.log\('Not found'\); return;} const usdc=j.balances.find\(b=>b.asset_code==='USDC'\); console.log\('XLM:', j.balances.find\(b=>b.asset_type==='native'\)?.balance\); console.log\('USDC:', usdc?.balance ?? 'no trustline'\); }catch\(e\){console.log\('Error:', e.message, d.join\(''\).slice\(0,200\)\);} }\);")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('@x402/stellar'\); console.log\('all exports:', Object.keys\(p\).join\('\\n'\)\);")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Nested SDK version \(@x402/stellar uses\):', d['version']\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const a=JSON.parse\(d\); const usdc=a.balances.find\(b=>b.asset_code==='USDC'\); console.log\('Server USDC:', usdc?.balance ?? 'no USDC trustline'\);")
